name: Pineapple Chiffon Cake
recipeInstructions:
------------
Sift together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and 1 teaspoon salt. Make a well in the center and add the oil, yolks, and juice. Beat until smooth. In a large mixing bowl, beat the egg whites and cream of tartar to form very stiff peaks. Pour the batter into thin streams over the egg white surface; gently fold in. Bake in an ungreased 1-inch tube pan at 350°F for 60 minutes. Invert and cool. Split into 2 layers. Fill and frost with Pineapple Topping.
PINEAPPLE TOPPING:
Whip 2 cups whipping cream; fold in one 20-ounce can crushed pineapple, well drained.
